name: Screensaver Activities Detected
description: Detection of suspicious screensaver activities. Attackers may replace legitimate screensavers or modify their behavior to maintain persistence, execute malicious code, or achieve defense evasion. This prompt helps investigate unusual process executions or modifications related to screensavers, which could indicate a compromise.

prompts.prompt: Investigate the suspicious screensaver activity detected at `{timestamp}` on host `{hostname}`. The process `{process_name}` with Process ID `{process_id}` was involved in an unusual screensaver-related action. Analyze the command line (`{command_line}`) for any suspicious arguments and review the user (`{user}`) associated with the activity. Determine if this is a legitimate system behavior or a potential malicious activity (e.g., persistence mechanism, defense evasion). Provide a summary of your findings and suggest immediate mitigation steps.

parameters.name: hostname
parameters.description: The hostname where the event was detected.

parameters.name: process_name
parameters.description: The name of the process involved in the screensaver activity.

parameters.name: process_id
parameters.description: The Process ID of the process involved in the screensaver activity.

parameters.name: command_line
parameters.description: The full command line of the process involved in the screensaver activity.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: The user account under which the process was executed.
